title: Add public card export with safety filtering (Golden Test 11)
problem: ticket-013 enforces contract drift but public export remains a Phase 0 placeholder. Golden Test 11 requires curated public card JSON with only whitelisted fields and no raw source text, prompts, or private paths.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 11: public card export contains only curated public fields.
rge/modules/card_exporter.py: NotImplementedError stub; research export-public returns not_implemented.
acceptance_criteria: research export-public --limit N writes public-safe card JSON without Ollama.
Export excludes raw source text, prompts, secrets, and local paths; includes whitelisted card fields per Golden Test 11.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph, theory generation, or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
rollback_plan: Revert branch phase-1/ticket-014-public-card-export. Delete generated public JSON artifacts from apps/public-site/public/data if needed.
